title: Environment Setup & Validation
description: Pre-flight validation script that checks Python version, conda environment, and required package availability before running training or inference.
activity_flow: DEFINE packages = [torch, torchvision, diffusers, transformers, megatron.core, transformer_engine]
call check_packages(packages) → iterates base package list
[ImportError/Exception] print ERROR message, set all_success = False
[True] call check_packages(packages_training) → same iteration logic for training deps
[False] no explicit exit — script ends silently (failures already printed inline)

functions.name: check_packages
args: package_list: list of importable module name strings
functions.side_effects: Modifies global all_success = False on any import failure
functions.notes: Uses importlib.import_module; prints colored [ERROR]/[SUCCESS] per package

conditions: CONDA_PREFIX in env — SOFT WARNING, non-fatal
all_success global — determines final success banner
global_state: all_success (bool) — set True at init, flipped to False by check_packages on any failure
important_notes: Script runs at module level (no __main__ guard). parse_args() called immediately on import. Exit code: 1 on Python version failure; implicit 0 even if packages missing (non-zero exit not triggered by package failures).
